name: Active Scanning
description: Adversaries scan victim infrastructure to identify targets for exploitation
detection: Monitor for unusual network scanning patterns, large volumes of ICMP/TCP SYN packets
mitigation: Network segmentation, rate limiting, honeypots to detect scanners

name: Gather Victim Host Info
description: Collect information about victim hosts including hardware, software, configurations
detection: Monitor public sources for organizational information disclosure
mitigation: Limit publicly available system information, information security awareness

name: Gather Victim Identity Info
description: Gather identity information about victims including credentials and PII
detection: Monitor for scraping of employee directories and social platforms
mitigation: Enforce least privilege, monitor credential exposure on paste sites

name: Acquire Infrastructure
description: Adversaries buy, lease, or rent infrastructure for staging operations
detection: Monitor for registration of new domains that mimic legitimate organizations
mitigation: Threat intelligence feeds monitoring for lookalike domains

name: Develop Capabilities
description: Build custom tools or malware to use in operations
detection: Difficult to detect; look for novel malware signatures and C2 patterns
mitigation: Endpoint detection, behavioral analysis

name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
description: Exploit weakness in internet-facing application to gain access
detection: Web application firewall logs, IDS alerts, unusual process spawning from web services
mitigation: Patch management, WAF, vulnerability scanning, input validation

name: Phishing
description: Send malicious emails to gain access to victim systems
detection: Email gateway analysis, user reporting, link analysis
mitigation: Email filtering, user training, MFA, attachment sandboxing

name: Valid Accounts
description: Use legitimate credentials to gain initial access
detection: Impossible travel alerts, off-hours logins, new geolocations
mitigation: MFA, privileged access management, password policies

name: External Remote Services
description: Leverage external remote services like VPN, Citrix to access systems
detection: Monitor authentication logs for external remote service usage
mitigation: MFA on all remote services, allowlisted IPs

name: Hardware Additions
description: Introduce malicious hardware such as network implants
detection: Network device discovery, MAC address monitoring
mitigation: Physical security controls, USB port restrictions

name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
description: Abuse command-line interfaces to execute commands
detection: Process creation logs showing powershell.exe, cmd.exe, bash with suspicious args
mitigation: Application allowlisting, PowerShell constrained language mode

name: Windows Management Instrumentation
description: Use WMI for lateral movement and execution
detection: WMI activity logs, unusual WMI process creation
mitigation: WMI activity auditing, restrict WMI access

name: Scheduled Task/Job
description: Abuse task scheduling to execute malicious code
detection: Monitor scheduled task creation/modification events
mitigation: Audit scheduled tasks, restrict task creation permissions

name: User Execution
description: Rely on user to execute malicious file or link
detection: Endpoint detection of suspicious file execution, macro execution
mitigation: User training, disable macros, file extension filtering

name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution
description: Configure malicious programs to run at system boot or user logon
detection: Monitor registry run keys, startup folder modifications
mitigation: Endpoint detection, registry monitoring, application control

name: Account Manipulation
description: Manipulate accounts to maintain access including adding credentials
detection: Monitor account changes, new accounts, privilege changes
mitigation: Privileged access management, account change alerting

name: Create or Modify System Process
description: Create or modify system-level processes to execute malicious code
detection: Monitor service creation and modification events
mitigation: Audit system service changes, application control

name: Server Software Component
description: Install server software components such as web shells
detection: Monitor web server files for unexpected changes, web shell detection
mitigation: File integrity monitoring, web server hardening

name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
description: Bypass UAC or sudo to elevate privileges
detection: UAC bypass attempts, sudo log monitoring
mitigation: Restrict UAC override, monitor privileged process creation

name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
description: Exploit software vulnerabilities for privilege escalation
detection: Kernel exploit detection, privilege escalation alerts
mitigation: Patch management, exploit mitigation (DEP, ASLR)

name: Access Token Manipulation
description: Manipulate access tokens to escalate privileges or evade detection
detection: Token creation and impersonation events
mitigation: Privileged access management, least privilege

name: Impair Defenses
description: Disable or tamper with security tools to evade detection
detection: Security tool status monitoring, SIEM alerts on AV/EDR disablement
mitigation: Tamper protection on security tools, alert on defense disablement

name: Indicator Removal
description: Delete or alter artifacts to cover tracks
detection: File deletion events, log clearing alerts, event log monitoring
mitigation: Centralized logging, immutable log storage

name: Masquerading
description: Manipulate features to make malicious artifacts look legitimate
detection: Process name anomaly detection, file hash verification
mitigation: Application allowlisting, code signing

name: Obfuscated Files or Information
description: Encrypt, encode, or obfuscate files to make analysis harder
detection: Entropy analysis, deobfuscation tools, AMSI scanning
mitigation: Script block logging, AMSI integration

name: Brute Force
description: Try many credentials to gain unauthorized access
detection: Authentication failure rate monitoring, lockout alerts
mitigation: Account lockout, MFA, rate limiting

name: OS Credential Dumping
description: Dump credentials from OS or software
detection: LSASS access monitoring, credential dumping tool signatures
mitigation: Credential Guard, restricted LSASS access

name: Credentials from Password Stores
description: Collect credentials from password managers or browsers
detection: Browser credential store access, password manager process monitoring
mitigation: Endpoint protection, encrypted credential stores

name: Steal Web Session Cookie
description: Steal web session cookies to bypass authentication
detection: Cookie theft patterns, impossible travel detection
mitigation: Short session timeouts, secure/httponly cookie flags

name: Account Discovery
description: Enumerate user accounts to identify targets
detection: net user, Get-ADUser, LDAP enumeration logs
mitigation: Limit domain enumeration, audit LDAP queries

name: Network Service Discovery
description: Scan network to identify services running on hosts
detection: Network scanning signatures, port scan detection
mitigation: Network segmentation, firewall rules, honeypots

name: System Information Discovery
description: Gather details about the system configuration
detection: Unusual systeminfo, uname, hostname command execution
mitigation: Application control, behavioral monitoring

name: File and Directory Discovery
description: Enumerate files and directories to identify targets
detection: Mass file enumeration, dir/ls commands in unusual contexts
mitigation: Least privilege, file access auditing

name: Remote Services
description: Use valid accounts to log into remote services for lateral movement
detection: Unusual remote login patterns, east-west traffic monitoring
mitigation: MFA on internal systems, network segmentation

name: Use Alternate Authentication Material
description: Use alternate credentials like pass-the-hash to move laterally
detection: Abnormal NTLM authentication, unusual Kerberos ticket activity
mitigation: Credential Guard, network monitoring for lateral movement

name: Taint Shared Content
description: Deliver malicious payloads via shared network resources
detection: Unusual file writes to shared drives, DFS monitoring
mitigation: Shared drive permissions, file integrity monitoring

name: Email Collection
description: Collect email content for information gathering or exfiltration
detection: Mass email access patterns, unusual mail protocol activity
mitigation: Email DLP, access auditing, MFA on mail

name: Data Staged
description: Stage collected data in a central location before exfiltration
detection: Large data staging in temp directories, archive creation
mitigation: DLP, file access monitoring, endpoint detection

name: Archive Collected Data
description: Archive data using compression or encryption prior to exfiltration
detection: Unusual archive creation, encrypted archive activity
mitigation: File creation monitoring, DLP

name: Application Layer Protocol
description: Use application layer protocols for C2 communication
detection: Unusual DNS, HTTP/S patterns, beaconing detection
mitigation: DNS filtering, SSL inspection, network behavioral analysis

name: Protocol Tunneling
description: Tunnel C2 traffic over legitimate protocols
detection: DNS tunneling detection, unusual ICMP patterns
mitigation: Deep packet inspection, protocol anomaly detection

name: Ingress Tool Transfer
description: Transfer tools or files from external system to victim network
detection: Unusual outbound/inbound file transfers, BITS jobs
mitigation: Egress filtering, application control

name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
description: Exfiltrate data over existing C2 channel
detection: Unusual data volumes over established C2 channels
mitigation: Network monitoring, DLP, egress filtering

name: Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol
description: Exfiltrate using a protocol different from C2 channel
detection: DNS, ICMP, HTTP exfiltration signatures
mitigation: Protocol allowlisting, DLP, cloud app security

name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
description: Use external web services for exfiltration
detection: Unusual uploads to cloud storage services, Pastebin activity
mitigation: Cloud access security broker (CASB), web filtering

name: Data Encrypted for Impact
description: Encrypt data on victim systems to interrupt availability — ransomware
detection: Mass file encryption events, unusual shadow copy deletion
mitigation: Backup strategy, endpoint detection, behavioral AI

name: Inhibit System Recovery
description: Delete backups and shadow copies to prevent recovery
detection: Volume shadow copy deletion, backup software interference
mitigation: Immutable backups, tamper-protected recovery

name: Data Destruction
description: Destroy data and files to interrupt availability
detection: Mass file deletion, disk wipe signatures
mitigation: Immutable storage, data backup policies

name: Endpoint Denial of Service
description: Perform DoS attacks to degrade or block availability
detection: CPU/memory resource exhaustion, process flooding
mitigation: Resource limits, endpoint protection
